name: Mary Oliver
bio: American poet known for her accessible, pastoral poetry rooted in the natural world.

name: Lucille Clifton
bio: American poet and writer celebrated for her spare, powerful verse on race, family, and the body.
top_work: Blessing the Boats: New and Selected Poems

name: Octavia E. Butler
bio: American science fiction author and MacArthur Fellow best known for Kindred and the Parable series.

name: Katherine Boo
bio: American journalist and author; Pulitzer Prize winner known for narrative nonfiction on poverty and inequality.

name: Siddhartha Mukherjee
bio: Indian-American physician, oncologist, and Pulitzer Prize-winning author of books on medicine and biology.

name: Tracy Kidder
bio: American nonfiction author known for immersive reporting on ordinary lives and social systems.
